title: Inbound leads down week-over-week (demo data)
body: PingDesk inbound dropped to 22 leads (7d) vs 31 prior (demo data). Decline concentrated in organic search. Worth a look before it compounds.

action.note: Review GSC query drop for the top 3 landing pages.

title: Pause underperforming ad set (demo data)
body: Ad set 'PingDesk-retarget-2' demo CPA is 2.1x the account target over the last 7d. Recommend pausing and reallocating budget to the top performer.

title: Striking-distance keyword on page 2 (demo data)
body: 'team inbox automation' sits at demo position 12 with rising impressions. A focused internal-link + intro refresh could push it onto page 1.

title: Newsletter cadence slipped — schedule next issue (demo data)
body: Last send was 9d ago (demo data) against a weekly target. Draft and queue the next PingDesk product-update issue.

title: Top demo clip ready to repurpose (demo data)
body: A long-form clip pulled demo-strong watch-time. Cut a 20s vertical and stage it in the drip queue for product_b.

title: Publish drafted comparison post (demo data)
body: A 'PingDesk vs alternatives' comparison draft is review-ready. Approve to publish to the product_b blog.

title: PR outreach pipeline is empty (demo data)
body: No outreach sends in 14d (demo data). Refill the prospect list before the channel goes fully dark.

title: High-fit forum thread to reply to (demo data)
body: A community thread scored demo 82 for fit ('how do you triage support calls?'). Manual reply recommended — no auto-posting.

title: Confirm conversion tracking after deploy (demo data)
body: A recent landing-page deploy may have affected the conversion pixel. Verify events are firing before the next ad spend cycle.

title: Stand up LinkedIn posting driver (demo data)
body: LinkedIn for product_b has no driver yet — highest untapped surface in the demo plan. Skeleton exists; login still pending.
